formdata.description: Required: JSON request body
Required: Service Invoice / Official Receipt
Required: Itemized Breakdown of Charges (can upload multiple files)
Required: Medcert/Document Indicating Diagnosis
Required for Consultation: IR why consultation was not covered by MediCard
Required: Bank Documents (ATM/passbook image)
Optional: Doctor's Prescription (required for Medicine)
Optional: Operative Technique (required for Surgical/Procedure)
Optional: Hospital Statement of Account (required for Inpatient)
Optional: Certificate of Live Birth (required for Maternity)
Optional: Live Birth (required for Maternity)

request.description: Submit reimbursement request for Outpatient Consultation. Required documents: Service Invoice, Itemized Breakdown, Medcert, IR Document, and Bank Documents. **IMPORTANT**: memberCode in request JSON must match memberCode in JWT token.
